negative_prompt: visible brand earbuds, neon lighting, busy tabletop, readable text

script_snippet: and comment below: "I will put God first."
hero_subject: Hands of the protagonist typing a short comment on a smartphone, screen angled so text is not legible.
image_prompt: Hands typing a short comment on a smartphone with screen angled away
negative_prompt: legible text, brand logos, visible usernames, cluttered background

script_snippet: Also, share this video with someone who needs encouragement and spiritual direction today.
hero_subject: Protagonist in their 30s holding a smartphone, thumb hovering over a paused video on the screen, seated at a kitchen table
image_prompt: Protagonist holding a smartphone with a paused video on screen
negative_prompt: cluttered background, harsh fluorescent light, cartoonish, visible text on screen, logos, screen reflections
